runs.text: From zero to deployed — type-safe routes, database integration, auth middleware, and CI/CD. Everything you need to ship confidently.

texts.text: From zero to deployed — type-safe routes, database integration, auth middleware, and CI/CD. Everything you need to ship confidently.
Prerequisites: Node 20+, Docker, VS Code Repo: github.com/devon/ts-api-workshop

notes: Introduce yourself. Set expectations for hands-on workshop.

runs.text: Initialize a Hono app with TypeScript strict mode, configure ESLint, Prettier, and path aliases.

texts.text: Initialize a Hono app with TypeScript strict mode, configure ESLint, Prettier, and path aliases.

runs.text: Define request/response schemas, build validated endpoints, and generate OpenAPI docs automatically.

texts.text: Define request/response schemas, build validated endpoints, and generate OpenAPI docs automatically.

runs.text: Connect Postgres via Docker, define schemas, run migrations, and write type-safe queries.

texts.text: Connect Postgres via Docker, define schemas, run migrations, and write type-safe queries.

runs.text: JWT auth middleware, role-based guards, integration tests with Vitest, and test fixtures.

texts.text: JWT auth middleware, role-based guards, integration tests with Vitest, and test fixtures.

runs.text: Dockerfile, GitHub Actions CI, deploy to Fly.io, health checks, and monitoring basics.

texts.text: Dockerfile, GitHub Actions CI, deploy to Fly.io, health checks, and monitoring basics.

notes: Walk through the agenda. Emphasize that each section has exercises.

texts.text: The type system isyour runtime guard.

runs.text: Define your API contract once with Zod schemas. Get compile-time safety, runtime validation, and auto-generated documentation — from a single source of truth.

texts.text: Define your API contract once with Zod schemas. Get compile-time safety, runtime validation, and auto-generated documentation — from a single source of truth.

runs.text: TypeScript catches schema mismatches before you deploy

texts.text: TypeScript catches schema mismatches before you deploy

runs.text: Zod parses and validates every incoming request body

texts.text: Zod parses and validates every incoming request body

runs.text: Generate Swagger UI from your Zod schemas — always in sync

texts.text: Generate Swagger UI from your Zod schemas — always in sync

notes: Explain the mental model before diving into code.

texts.text: Build a CRUD API for atodo list.
Define a TodoSchema with Zod (title, completed, priority)
Create POST /todos with validated JSON body
Create PATCH /todos/:id with partial update schema

notes: Give people 10 minutes. Walk around and help.

texts.text: Manual req.body parsing — crashes on malformed JSON

runs.text: API docs written by hand — stale within a week

texts.text: API docs written by hand — stale within a week

texts.text: Type errors discovered in production at 3am

texts.text: Frontend and backend types drift silently

texts.text: Auto-validated requests — invalid input returns 400 with details

texts.text: Shared Zod schemas between frontend and backend

runs.text: 5 lines of schema = validation + types + docs

runs.text: fewer production type-related incidents in teams that adopted this stack (Source: 2025 State of TypeScript Report)

notes: Show the contrast. This is the 'aha' moment.

runs.text: Define your contract once — in Zod — and let everything else derive from it.

texts.text: Define your contract once — in Zod — and let everything else derive from it.

runs.text: Types, validation, documentation, and client SDK generation. Single source of truth eliminates drift.

texts.text: Types, validation, documentation, and client SDK generation. Single source of truth eliminates drift.

runs.text: Test the integration, not the units. Hit a real database in tests.

texts.text: Test the integration, not the units. Hit a real database in tests.

runs.text: Docker Compose + test fixtures + transactions = fast, reliable, realistic tests that catch real bugs.

texts.text: Docker Compose + test fixtures + transactions = fast, reliable, realistic tests that catch real bugs.

runs.text: Ship on day one. Iterate from production, not localhost.

texts.text: Ship on day one. Iterate from production, not localhost.

runs.text: A deployed "hello world" with CI/CD is worth more than a perfect local setup. Get the pipeline working first.

texts.text: A deployed "hello world" with CI/CD is worth more than a perfect local setup. Get the pipeline working first.

notes: Wrap up. These are the three things to remember.
Share the links. Mention the Discord for follow-up questions.
